notes: Extended cases for stack creation from a linked list and even-number removal.

cases.name: sample_create_stack_and_remove_evens
expect_contains_all: The resulting stack after removing even integers is: 7 5 3 1

cases.name: all_even_values_are_removed
expect_contains_all: The resulting stack after removing even integers is: Empty

cases.name: odd_values_remain_unchanged
expect_contains_all: The resulting stack after removing even integers is: 5 3 1
